dashboard.welcome: Hi! How can I help you today?

guideItems: Don't give money to authorities (it's a bribe)
Check your car isn't flagged by pico y placa restrictions
sidebarTourist.faqBody: Ask the chat about traffic, fines, or your rights with authorities.

walletModal.title: Connect wallet
walletModal.description: You need to connect your wallet to sign documents and view your credentials.
walletModal.hint: Confirm the connection and signature in your wallet's popup.

signatureModal.title: Signed receipt acknowledgement
signatureModal.intro: You are about to cryptographically sign that you received this document.
signatureModal.confirmHint: A popup will open asking you to confirm the signature with your wallet.
